steps: Contact BNP Paribas Securities to request refund of EUR 3,744.00 overpayment on TTE dividend for account 901234567
Provide documentation showing FR-NO treaty rate of 15% applies, not the 13.5% rate apparently used
Reference the double taxation agreement between France and Norway to support the correct withholding calculation
If BNP Paribas disputes, escalate with formal claim citing treaty provisions and custodian's duty to apply correct rates
